title: I need a solution for a pivot table for time tracking (using TIME TRACKING COLUMN!)
excerpt:
Hello 
Someone knows an App or other solution to make a report, based on Time Tracking column? 
Please, don’t address me to solutions that don’t use Time Tracking column like Harvest, Timefy or Omnitas Consulting. 
I rea…

posts.author: robertogentile (Roberto Gentile - Inova e-Business)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

Someone knows an App or other solution to make a report, based on Time Tracking column?

Please, don’t address me to solutions that don’t use Time Tracking column like Harvest, Timefy or Omnitas Consulting.

I really need to use time tracking column.

A lot of thanks if someone can reply me.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @robertogentile

One of our apps (Rollup Multiple Boards) does support time tracking. Before making a statement that this is THE app you need let’s try to find out your exact requirements.

Is the time tracker on just one board?
Are there multiple time tracker columns?
Are time tracker columns used in subitems?
What do you want to see (sum only?)

posts.author: Yoggie (Yogev David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @robertogentile !

There’s a took called Monday Duration Manager for time tracking, it will give you a report you can connect to a google sheet with a CSV USL and “importData” function.

image2542×1651 354 KB

Let me know if you need help installing and using it.

posts.author: robertogentile (Roberto Gentile - Inova e-Business)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Yoggie

I liked the idea, however, I didn’t find any information about this application or company, is this your plugin?

I must say it is simple but very useful.

image655×771 31 KB

Thank you!

posts.author: robertogentile (Roberto Gentile - Inova e-Business)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @basdebruin

I need something to see, detailed, each task, with hour, for each person in my company logged in time tracking.

The necessity is:

  • To I send report detailed to my customers about hours;
  • To my freelancers send to me the bill to I pay them, with detailed report based on Monday;

Something like

Person 1
Task 1 | Project A | 5 hours
Task 2 | Project A | 10 hours
Task 3 | Project B | 12 hours

Person 2
Task 1 | Project C | 7 hours
Task 2 | Project D | 8 hours
Task 3 | Project D | 9 hours

Person 2
Task 1 | Project A | 2 hours
Task 2 | Project B | 4 hours
Task 3 | Project C | 6 hours

Do you understand?

Thank you for your help

posts.author: Yoggie (Yogev David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah I’ve built it
Let me know if you run into any problems.

Edited:
You might want to use Monday CSV URL
It works just the same only it gives you the full board.

posts.author: Hainer.Farias (Hainer Farias)
posts.cookedHtml:
basdebruin:

Rollup Multiple Boards

Hi @basdebruin. I’m curious about your app “Rollup Multiple Boards”. How can I access more information?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Hainer.Farias

The app can be found in the monday market place https://monday.com/marketplace/101 or at our app-store at 20|Rollup Multiple Boards - Excellent Team. From our app-store you and the market place you can install the app in trial mode. Our app-store also provides a link to this detailed document

posts.author: mattwright (Matt Wright)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Yoggie - I can’t get this link to install or download properly. Is it still an active solution?

posts.cookedHtml:
@robertogentile - did you ever find a working solution for this need? What you have outlined is exactly what I am looking to do as well!

I need something to see, detailed, each task, with hour, for each person in my company logged in time tracking.

The necessity is:

  • To I send report detailed to my customers about hours;
  • To my freelancers send to me the bill to I pay them, with detailed report based on Monday;

Something like

Person 1
Task 1 | Project A | 5 hours
Task 2 | Project A | 10 hours
Task 3 | Project B | 12 hours

Person 2
Task 1 | Project C | 7 hours
Task 2 | Project D | 8 hours

posts.author: robertogentile (Roberto Gentile - Inova e-Business)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Kim_M !

Yes! I’m using an application called “Plus for Monday” see here https://www.plusformonday.com/

Basically, you pay for one of two types of profiles: manager or guest. Guests only have access to their account, on the other hand the Manager can see all the people inside the account.

It’s very interesting. If you have questions about this app, please email to caiocsl@gmail.com. This guy is the developer.

Thanks!

posts.author: PAcloud (Wendy Laverty)
posts.cookedHtml: How did you get around the CPF Number, looks like it is a tax number; I have tried entering nothing, entering my VAT and entering my co reg nothing works

posts.author: PAcloud (Wendy Laverty)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, installed now but sorry to be a little confused how do I use it?

posts.author: Yoggie (Yogev David)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PAcloud

There’s a full explanation here:

Connect a Google Spreadsheet with Monday Boards using a CSV file URL - Free App! Share your monday apps!
Make sure you post answers the following questions so users know exactly what the value is: - What is your app called? Monday CSV Converter for Google Sheets - Why did you build this app? I needed to connect a Google Sheet with a Monday board so I wouldn’t have to keep updating the both sides. - What does your app do? It’ll give you a URL you can copy and paste in you Google Sheet, it’ll pull all the current data from the board. - What example use cases and workflows does this app apply t…

If you still need some help, contact me at monday.formrally.com or at yogev@formrally.com

posts.author: PAcloud (Wendy Laverty)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I will try that

posts.author: PAcloud (Wendy Laverty)
posts.cookedHtml: Working like a dream, thank you

posts.author: LukasAvisi (Lukas van Paridon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, here’s a great solution:

Tracket - The #1 time tracking app in monday.com

Currently the number one go-to solution when the native time tracking feature is too limited for you. It comes with:

  • logging time with multiple people simultaneously
  • Personal timesheets
  • Approvals
  • Personal and team reports & widgets
  • Exports
  • Available API
  • And more!

We’ve got clients tracking time all the way up to 800 users, I’d love to tell you more, Schedule a demo with me here

Or download the app and start the 21-day free trial in the monday.com marketplace to try it out for yourself.

Happy time tracking,

Lukas, Avisi Apps
